scenario: Controlled /rosout error injection to test HELIX log parser detectability
commands: ros2 topic pub /rosout rcl_interfaces/msg/Log "{stamp: {sec: 0, nanosec: 0}, level: 40, name: 'helix_test_injector', msg: 'HELIX_TEST: simulated error condition', file: 'test', function: 'test', line: 0}" --times 5 --rate 0.5
expected_effect: 5 ERROR-level messages appear on /rosout alongside normal rosout traffic
observed_effect: 23 total /rosout messages captured, 5 of which are injected ERROR-level test messages. Injection is clearly labeled with 'helix_test_injector' source and 'HELIX_TEST' prefix.
supports_claim: HELIX log_parser can detect injected error conditions in /rosout stream; demonstrates fault injection is feasible and safe
notes: Perturbation is fully reversible - only published to /rosout topic. Level 40 = ERROR in ROS2 logging.
